name: Baba Ganouj (Tangy Eggplant Dip)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 300°F.
2. Pierce each eggplant with a fork several times.
3. Place the eggplants on a baking sheet and bake in the preheated oven for about 40 minutes, or until they begin to deflate and become tender when pierced.
4. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly.
5. Scoop out the insides of the cooled eggplants into a bowl, discarding the skins.
6. Mash the eggplant flesh with a fork until it reaches your desired consistency.
7. Add the tahini, garlic juice, parsley (if using), salt, and black pepper to the mashed eggplant. Mix well until all ingredients are fully incorporated.
8. Serve the dip chilled or at room temperature, spread over bread for 4-6 sandwiches, or serve with vegetables and pita chips for 6-8 people.
